title: Last Horizon
description:
Список возможностейFeatures:

• Atmospheric Space Exploration: A seamless, minimalist journey through the galaxy.

• Resource Survival: Balance fuel and oxygen to keep your mission alive.

• Procedural Universes: A new map and new challenges with every playthrough.

• Physics-Based Gameplay: Feel the pull of gravity and the weight of your momentum.

• Ancient Secrets: Encounter alien life and strange celestial phenomena.

Об игреA Fallen World. A Silent Void. A Final Hope.

I have a long way to travel. My compass points the way home.

The home world has fallen. You are the pilot of humanity’s last vessel, a lone scout sent into the deep reaches of the vast unknown. Your mission: find a new habitable world and seed the future of a dying civilization. But the stars are as indifferent as they are beautiful, and the vacuum of space is an unforgiving host.

Master the Art of Space FlightIn Last Horizon, survival is a delicate dance of physics and resource management. Pilot your craft through procedurally generated star systems where every move matters.

• Skillful Piloting: Master inertial movement and gravity wells to navigate asteroid fields and planetary orbits.

• Vital Management: Monitor your oxygen, fuel, and hull integrity. Every landing is a risk; every takeoff is a cost.

• Touchdown: Execute precision landings on diverse planets to extract the life-giving resources needed for your journey.

The Burden of SurvivalYou are not just traveling; you are terraforming. To create a harmonious new world, you must gather resources and rescue space-faring human survivors scattered across the galaxy.

• Harvest with Care: Take what you need to survive, but beware—the universe is not empty. Over-harvesting or disrupting the local ecology may incur the wrath of sentient alien life.

• Beautiful Desolation: Experience a hauntingly atmospheric journey backed by a minimalist aesthetic and a meditative ambient soundtrack.

A New Beginning or a Silent End?Every run is a unique voyage through the cosmos. Will you navigate the perils of deep space to reach your destination and begin anew? Or will humanity’s last hope be lost forever to the frozen vacuum?

The stars are calling. The compass is set. Can you reach the Last Horizon?
description_short: Pilot the last vessel of a fallen civilization into the vast expanse of space. Collect resources and search for a new world to call home in this minimalist space exploration and survival game.
